# problem_classes.masterclass_parallel { #skrom.problem_classes.masterclass_parallel }

`problem_classes.masterclass_parallel`

Parallel implementation of master_class using multithreading for snapshot generation and ROM evaluation.

## Notes {.doc-section .doc-section-notes}

Authors: Suparno Bhattacharyya

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [ensure_problem_registered](#skrom.problem_classes.masterclass_parallel.ensure_problem_registered) | Ensure that the requested problem is present in ``PROBLEM_REGISTRY``. |
| [register_problem](#skrom.problem_classes.masterclass_parallel.register_problem) | Register a problem class under a string key. |

### ensure_problem_registered { #skrom.problem_classes.masterclass_parallel.ensure_problem_registered }

```python
problem_classes.masterclass_parallel.ensure_problem_registered(problem_name)
```

Ensure that the requested problem is present in ``PROBLEM_REGISTRY``.

This handles the common case where the problem class lives in the local
``problem_def.py`` file and has not been imported yet.

### register_problem { #skrom.problem_classes.masterclass_parallel.register_problem }

```python
problem_classes.masterclass_parallel.register_problem(name)
```

Register a problem class under a string key.
